# Zibo Unique

Zibo Unique is an industrial food processing machinery manufacturer for vegetable, seafood, meat and central kitchen production.

Primary contact:
- Email: Miameng@zibounique.com
- WhatsApp: +86 13058068287
- WhatsApp link: https://wa.me/8613058068287

Core pages:
- Home: https://zibounique.mintlify.app/
- About Us: https://zibounique.mintlify.app/about/
- Products: https://zibounique.mintlify.app/products/
- Seafood Processing Machines: https://zibounique.mintlify.app/products/seafood-processing-machines/
- Vegetable Processing Machines: https://zibounique.mintlify.app/products/vegetable-processing-machines/
- Complete Processing Lines: https://zibounique.mintlify.app/solutions/complete-processing-lines/
- Applications: https://zibounique.mintlify.app/applications/
- Contact: https://zibounique.mintlify.app/contact/

Product categories:
- Vegetable Processing Machines
- Seafood Processing Machines
- Meat Processing Machines
- Central Kitchen Equipment
- Potato Processing Machines
- Packing and Weighing Machines
- Complete Processing Lines

Target customers:
- Overseas food processing factories
- Central kitchens and ready-meal plants
- Seafood processing plants
- Fruit and vegetable processing plants

Priority markets:
- Middle East
- Southeast Asia
- Europe
- Latin America

Quotation information buyers should provide:
- Raw material and product size range
- Required hourly capacity
- Processing steps needed
- Factory space or layout limits
- Water, drainage, and power conditions
- Packing method and final product format
